BuildVentStep1.title: Build an air ventilator
BuildVentStep1.description:
Now that your ship has functioning life support, it will need an [color=KHAKI]Air Ventilator[/color] to discharge its gases in to any rooms it is connected to.

Select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Air Ventilator[/color] button from the [color=PURPLE]Atmosphere[/color] menu.

BuildVentStep2.description:
Now place this inside your ship on any available [color=KHAKI]Deck Plating[/color].

This will need to be connected to your [color=KHAKI]Life Support[/color] via [color=KHAKI]Atmospheric Ducting[/color], however if you place them right next to each other, they will automatically connect.
